assertions.query: CREATE TABLE branches (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
SELECT "dolt_branches"."name" FROM "dolt_branches" WHERE "dolt_branches"."name" IN ('main') ORDER BY "dolt_branches"."name" DESC LIMIT 21;

WITH sorted_diffs_by_pk
									AS (SELECT
													"to_id",
													to_commit,
													to_commit_date,
													diff_type,
													ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
															PARTITION BY coalesce("to_id", "from_id")
															ORDER BY coalesce(to_commit_date, from_commit_date) DESC
													) row_num
											FROM "dolt_diff_test"
										)
									SELECT
											sd."to_id" AS "id",
											dl.committer,
											dl.email,
											dl.message
									FROM
											sorted_diffs_by_pk as sd,
											dolt_log as dl
									WHERE
											dl.commit_hash = sd.to_commit
											and sd.row_num = 1
											and sd.diff_type <> 'removed'
									ORDER BY
													sd."to_id" ASC;
